signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ripple USD (RLUSD) has completed its official full-scale deployment across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum, representing a major milestone for Ripple's ecosystem infrastructure[1].

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
The long-standing SEC legal dispute with Ripple is now officially concluded, removing a major regulatory overhang that had constrained institutional adoption[1].

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Advancing | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Advancing | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP ETF approvals have entered the final stage, with at least six live ETF products now operating and pulling in significant institutional capital ($224 million in inflows during the first week of April)[1][3].
